title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 1 of 1996
text: No. VC.CAU/I4(ESTABL orthe Central Agricultural of ihe Central Agricultural Government, hereby make the College of Horticulture IS)/94: In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) University Act, 1992 (Na 40 of 1992), I, the Vice-Chancellor University, lmphal, tith the previous approval of the Central the first Ordinance for the establishment and management of find Forestry, at Basar in Arunachal Pradesh namely • I There shall be a College of Horticulture and Forestry hereinafter, referred to henceforth as the said College at Basar in Arunachal Pradesh which shall be a constituent College of Central Agricultural University, Imphal: The said College shall be managed as per the Net. Statutes and Ordinances of the Central Agricultural University and the regulations made by the authorities of The Central Agricultural University from time to time. 3. The said College shall have 4 year Bachelor of Science in Horticulture and Bachelor of Science in Forestry degree programme. 4. The said College initially shall have an intake capacity of 22 students For each degree programme, including those to he admitted as per the provisions/nominations made by !CAR and the number of students may be. increased to a maximum of 40 for each degree programme.
